title: Global dataset of neuroinflammation biomarkers (IL-6, TNF-alpha, CRP) in depress
description:
Global dataset of neuroinflammation biomarkers (IL-6, TNF-alpha, CRP) in depression and major depressive disorder. Meta-analyses 2020-2024. DOI: 10.7910/DVN/QBQXKL

DOI: https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataset.xhtml?persistentId=doi:10.7910/DVN/QBQXKL
GitHub: https://github.com/juanmoisesd/neuroinflammation-biomarkers-depression-2020-2024
Author: de la Serna, Juan Moisés
